$$\frac{5^x}{5^x-4}+\frac{5^x+5}{5^x-5}+\frac{22}{25^x-9\cdot 5^x+20}\leq 0\\ t=5^x\\ \frac{t}{t-4}+\frac{t+5}{t-5}+\frac{22}{t^2-9\cdot t+20}\leq 0\\ \frac{t}{t-4}+\frac{t+5}{t-5}+\frac{22}{(t-4)(t-5)}\leq 0 \\ \frac{t^2-5t+t^2+t-20+22}{(t-4)(t-5)}\leq 0\\ \frac{2t^2-4t+2}{(t-4)(t-5)}\leq 0\\ \frac{t^2-2t+1}{(t-4)(t-5)}\leq 0$$
$$\frac{(t-1)^2}{(t-4)(t-5)}\leq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t=1\\ \begin{cases} t >4\\ t< 5 \end{cases} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 5^{x} =1\\ \begin{cases} 5^{x} >4\\ 5^{x} < 5 \end{cases} \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x=0\\ \begin{cases} x >\log_{5} 4\\ x< 1 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
$$x\in \left\{0\right\}\cup (\log_54;1)$$
Ответ: \(x\in \ \{0\} \cup \ (\log_{5} 4;1)\).
